summary.en: Tuya T5AI platform — ARM Cortex-M33 with Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 5.4 for edge-AI applications.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T5AI 平台 — ARM Cortex-M33，支持 Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 5.4，面向端侧 AI 应用。

description.en: Dual-core ARM Cortex-M33 with on-chip KWS, voice activity detection, lightweight AI inference, and Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 5.4 connectivity. Rich peripheral interfaces to support any IoT scenario. Purpose-built for edge-cloud multimodal LLM interaction — voice, video, audio, and GUI — at ultra-low power.
description.zh-CN: 双核 ARM Cortex-M33，片上集成语音唤醒（KWS）、语音检测与轻量 AI 推理，搭载 Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 5.4。丰富的硬件外设接口，满足各类 IoT 场景的创意与外设接入需求。专为端云多模态大模型交互打造——语音、视频、音频与 GUI 图形化界面交互，低功耗硬件首选。
